name: @ever-works/secret-store-k8s-plugin
description: Kubernetes Secret SecretStoreResolver plugin for Ever Works — resolves k8s:<name> or k8s:<ns>/<name> pointers via the in-cluster Kubernetes API. Opt-in via SECRET_STORE_RESOLVER DI binding override.

plugin.name: Kubernetes Secret Store
plugin.description: Resolves k8s:<name> or k8s:<ns>/<name> pointers via the in-cluster Kubernetes API. Reads bearer token + CA cert + default namespace from the service account mount at /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/.

envVars.name: KUBERNETES_SERVICE_HOST
envVars.description: API server IP — set automatically by kubelet for every in-cluster pod.

envVars.name: KUBERNETES_SERVICE_PORT
envVars.description: API server port — set automatically by kubelet. Defaults to 443.
